rationale: Both candidates correctly validate the core loader-migration logic and both independently surface the exact latent gap: the unswept HunyuanImage3 diffusion loader (hunyuan_image3_transformer.py:2238) still calling the removed get_cache_scale, matching issue #4891. Y demonstrates this via an explicit repo-wide grep sweep and flags it as a 'major' blocking-severity issue with concrete AttributeError failure mode plus a follow-up test-coverage fix, better matching the real-world consequence than X's non-blocking mention under an overall APPROVE verdict. Y also picks up more granular ground-truth-adjacent points (qwen2_old's prior silent-guard removal being safe, an untested None-mapper branch) giving it slightly better recall, while both keep precision high with well-grounded file/line evidence. X's test critique is solid but targets a different sub-issue (delegated-loader AutoWeightsLoader bypass) than the human reviewer's actual FP8-checkpoint-smoke-test ask, giving it slightly less coverage overlap than Y's.
